tasks.title: Create class library projects
tasks.description: Create 7 new class library projects under src/: Fulcrum.Core (framework abstractions + contracts), Fulcrum.News, Fulcrum.Recommendations, Fulcrum.Billing, Fulcrum.Notifications, Fulcrum.Analytics, Fulcrum.Admin. Delete auto-generated Class1.cs from each. Delete empty src/Fulcrum/ leftover directory.
steps: Delete Class1.cs from all new projects

history.note: Created 7 classlib projects, cleaned up .csproj to use Directory.Build.props, removed Auth Class1.cs, deleted empty src/Fulcrum/

tasks.title: Register projects in Fulcrum.slnx
tasks.description: Add all 7 new projects to the existing Fulcrum.slnx solution file. Verify all 9 projects are listed.
steps: dotnet sln Fulcrum.slnx add src/Fulcrum.Core/Fulcrum.Core.csproj src/Fulcrum.News/Fulcrum.News.csproj src/Fulcrum.Recommendations/Fulcrum.Recommendations.csproj src/Fulcrum.Billing/Fulcrum.Billing.csproj src/Fulcrum.Notifications/Fulcrum.Notifications.csproj src/Fulcrum.Analytics/Fulcrum.Analytics.csproj src/Fulcrum.Admin/Fulcrum.Admin.csproj
Verify with dotnet sln Fulcrum.slnx list

history.note: Added 7 new projects to Fulcrum.slnx. All 9 projects verified.

tasks.title: Wire up project references
tasks.description: Set up dependency graph: each module references Fulcrum.Core; Fulcrum.API references all modules + Core; no cross-module references.
steps: Add Fulcrum.Core reference to each module (Auth, News, Recommendations, Billing, Notifications, Analytics, Admin) using dotnet add reference
Add all module references + Core to Fulcrum.API
Verify no circular refs with dotnet build

history.note: Wired project references: 7 modules → Core, API → all 8 projects. Build succeeds 0 warnings.

tasks.title: Set up central package management
tasks.description: Create Directory.Packages.props with ManagePackageVersionsCentrally. Migrate existing package versions from individual .csproj files into central props.
steps: Migrate Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi 10.0.5 from Fulcrum.API.csproj into central props
Remove Version= from PackageReference in Fulcrum.API.csproj

history.note: Created Directory.Packages.props with central management. Migrated OpenApi 10.0.5. Cleaned API csproj. Build clean.

tasks.title: Clean up Fulcrum.API Program.cs
tasks.description: Remove default weather forecast boilerplate from Program.cs. Leave clean minimal host with builder, app, and Run only.
steps: Replace Program.cs content with clean minimal host (WebApplication.CreateBuilder, builder.Build, app.Run)

history.note: Stripped weather forecast boilerplate. Clean minimal host. Build clean.
